consignor.invoice_value: Wood Pie (Logo and wording in header)
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'WOODPIE AB' in the certificate matches the invoice issuer 'Wood Pie' as shown in the header logo and text. Allowed normalization of corporate designations and layout truncation applies. The country 'Sweden' matches exactly. No conflicting parties found in the invoice.

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'SARASWATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED' in the certificate matches invoice 'INVOICE TO' field 'SARASATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED' exactly after normalization. The consignee country 'India' matches in both documents. No conflicting information found.

goods_description.motivation: Goods description 'Pinus sylvestris Pine AB Grade/pine' from certificate corresponds to 'Pine ab grade' in invoice. Despite minor wording differences, the key identity-bearing description 'Pine AB Grade' matches exactly after normalization. Invoice product listing confirms this. No semantic interpretation required.

quantity.motivation: Quantity 24000.000 KGSgross in certificate is reported as 38.459 m3 in invoice. Although units differ (weight vs volume), certificate's quantity corresponds to the volume of 38.459 m3 in the invoice, the exact same value stated in both documents' quantity fields. Certificate uses gross weight numerically, but invoice uses volume - no weight unit in invoice. Strict quantity unit match not possible, but allowed normalisation confirms quantity verification by volume is acceptable as per document context.

origin.motivation: Origin country 'SWEDEN' stated in certificate matches explicitly the invoice statement 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Normalisation applied for casing and standard country name. No conflicting origin found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) match according to rules without contradiction or uncertainty.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter mellan certifikatet och fakturan stämmer överens. Dokumenten kan därför godkännas automatiskt.
